quality.rationale: 基于弗罗贝尼乌斯定理的纯几何推导，逻辑链条清晰但缺乏具体天体观测或工程应用背景

origin.question: Problem 11.10. Consider a family of stationary observers in a stationary spacetime, i.e. their 4-velocity is proportional to the time Killing vector $\pmb{\xi}$ . Each observer arranges his spatial basis vectors so that they connect to the same neighboring observers for all time $t$ , where $\pmb{\xi} = \frac{\partial}{\partial t}$ .(4) Show that $\omega = 0$ if the spacetime is static, and not merely stationary.
origin.solution:
在静态（static）时空中，时间基灵矢量 $\xi^\mu$ 是超曲面正交的（hypersurface orthogonal）。根据弗罗贝尼乌斯定理（Frobenius theorem），这等价于条件：$\xi_{[\mu} 
abla_
u \xi_{ho]} = 0$。对于静止观者族，其四速度 $u^\mu \propto \xi^\mu$。该观者族的涡度（vorticity）向量 $\omega^\mu$ 由基灵矢量的旋度构造：$\omega^\mu \propto \epsilon^{\mu
uho\sigma} \xi_
u 
abla_ho \xi_\sigma$。当且仅当 $\xi_{[\mu} 
abla_
u \xi_{ho]} = 0$ 时，上述反对称组合严格为零。因此，若时空为静态，涡度标量 $\omega = 0$。证毕。
